mappings.note: The cleanest 1:1. A derived non-read-only tool that declares readOnlyHint:true is the flagship write-as-readonly gap.

mappings.correspondence: destructiveHint:true corresponds to destructiveness in {mutating, deleting}
mappings.note: A derived deleting/mutating tool that declares destructiveHint:false, or omits it, is a destructive-unflagged gap.
A derived open-world tool that omits openWorldHint is an external-reach-undeclared gap.
Lower-stakes. Primarily informs blast radius; rarely a standalone verdict.
actlint's value-add. Supporting context and grade input only — never a phantom compliance failure against a field the protocol does not define.
A derived composite of the primary dimensions. Supporting context and grade input only — never a standalone verdict.
